story.iWant: telefon numaramı SMS OTP ile verify edebilmek
story.soThat: hesabımı aktif hale getirip login olabileyim
story.tasks: - Task 1: VerifyPhoneDto oluştur (src/modules/auth/dto/verify-phone.dto.ts) - Task 2: ResendVerificationOtpDto oluştur (src/modules/auth/dto/resend-verification-otp.dto.ts) - Task 3: AuthService.verifyPhone() method implement et - Task 4: AuthController.verifyPhone() endpoint oluştur (POST /auth/verify-phone) - Task 5: AuthService.resendVerificationOtp() method implement et - Task 6: AuthController.resendVerificationOtp() endpoint oluştur (POST /auth/resend-verification-otp) - Task 7: Unit test yaz - verifyPhone - Task 8: Unit test yaz - resendVerificationOtp - Task 9: Integration test yaz (test/auth-phone-verification.e2e-spec.ts)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: AC-2.7.1: POST /auth/verify-phone endpoint oluşturulmuş (public, authentication required değil) AC-2.7.2: Request DTO: phoneNumber + code (6-digit OTP) AC-2.7.3: OTP validated (exists, not expired, code match, attempts < 3, purpose: 'phone-verification') AC-2.7.4: Valid OTP → User.phoneVerified = true update edilir AC-2.7.5: OTP cleanup (verified=true marked or deleted) AC-2.7.6: Response: { success: true, message: "Phone verified successfully" } AC-2.7.7: Invalid OTP scenarios handled (expired, invalid code, max attempts) AC-2.7.8: POST /auth/resend-verification-otp endpoint oluşturulmuş (public) AC-2.7.9: Resend endpoint: phoneNumber ile yeni OTP generate eder ve SMS gönderir AC-2.7.10: Rate limiting: 3 attempts / 15 minutes per phone (resend endpoint) AC-2.7.11: Already verified users için graceful response (200 OK, "Already verified")

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Phone verification using SMS OTP with purpose='phone-verification'. OTP expiry: 5 minutes, max 3 attempts. Unverified users (phoneVerified=false) cannot login. Story 2.3 and 2.3.2 enforce this check.

doc.title: OTP Verification System
doc.snippet: Purpose field added in Story 2.6 to differentiate OTP types: 'login', 'password-reset', 'phone-verification'. Each purpose isolated to prevent cross-usage attacks.

doc.title: NFR Security
doc.snippet: Resend verification OTP: 3 attempts / 15 minutes per phone. Uses @Throttle decorator with ttl: 900000ms (15 min).

doc.title: Epic 2 Stories
doc.snippet: POST /auth/verify-phone validates OTP and updates User.phoneVerified. POST /auth/resend-verification-otp generates new OTP with rate limiting.

doc.title: Authentication Architecture
doc.snippet: JWT + Phone-based auth. Phone verification required before login. phoneVerified flag enforced in login flows.

doc.title: Previous Story Learnings
doc.snippet: OTPVerification.purpose field implemented (migration 20251105114216). OtpService methods extended: generateOtp(userID, purpose), validateOtp(userID, code, purpose?). SMS service stub with PHONE_VERIFICATION template ready.

artifact.reason: Complete OTP service with purpose field support. Methods: generateOtp(userID, purpose), validateOtp(userID, code, purpose?), deleteOtp(userID, code). Purpose type includes 'phone-verification'.
SMS service stub with template support. sendOTP() method accepts template: 'LOGIN_OTP' | 'PASSWORD_RESET' | 'PHONE_VERIFICATION'. Logs to console (Epic 5.1 will add FONIVA).
Main authentication service. Need to add verifyPhone() and resendVerificationOtp() methods. Already has forgotPassword() and resetPassword() patterns to follow.
Auth REST controller. Need to add POST /auth/verify-phone and POST /auth/resend-verification-otp endpoints with @Public() decorator.
Example DTO pattern for phone validation. Use @IsPhoneNumber('TR') and @IsNotEmpty() decorators. Follow same pattern for VerifyPhoneDto and ResendVerificationOtpDto.
Example DTO with OTP code validation. Uses @Length(6,6) and @Matches(/^\d{6}$/) for 6-digit code. Copy pattern for VerifyPhoneDto code field.
Public decorator for endpoints that don't require JWT authentication. Apply to both verify-phone and resend-verification-otp endpoints.
Database service for Prisma queries. Use prisma.user.findUnique(), prisma.user.update(), prisma.otpVerification methods.
User model with phoneVerified field (Boolean @default(false)). Story will update this field to true after OTP validation.
OTPVerification model with purpose field (String?, nullable). Purpose values: 'login', 'password-reset', 'phone-verification'. Expiry, attempts, verified fields.

story-context.constraints: 1. Use OtpService.validateOtp() with purpose='phone-verification' to ensure OTP purpose isolation 2. Apply @Public() decorator to both endpoints (users not logged in during verification) 3. Apply @Throttle({ default: { limit: 3, ttl: 900000 } }) to resend-verification-otp endpoint only 4. Follow error handling pattern from Story 2.6: Map OTP validation reasons to user-friendly messages 5. Implement graceful already-verified handling: Return 200 OK if user.phoneVerified === true (idempotent) 6. Update User.phoneVerified = true before deleting OTP (order matters for atomicity) 7. Use prisma.otpVerification.updateMany() to invalidate previous phone-verification OTPs in resend flow 8. Follow response format pattern: { success: true, message/data: {...} } 9. DTOs must be in src/modules/auth/dto/ directory 10. E2E test must be in test/ directory with .e2e-spec.ts suffix

interface.name: OtpService.generateOtp
interface.signature: async generateOtp(userID: string, purpose: OtpPurpose): Promise<string>

interface.name: OtpService.validateOtp
interface.signature: async validateOtp(userID: string, code: string, purpose?: OtpPurpose): Promise<OtpValidationResult>

interface.name: OtpService.deleteOtp
interface.signature: async deleteOtp(userID: string, code: string): Promise<void>

interface.name: SmsService.sendOTP
interface.signature: async sendOTP(phoneNumber: string, otpCode: string, template: 'LOGIN_OTP' | 'PASSWORD_RESET' | 'PHONE_VERIFICATION'): Promise<void>

interface.name: POST /auth/verify-phone
POST /auth/resend-verification-otp
OtpValidationResult

tests.standards: Jest testing framework with unit and E2E tests. Unit tests in src/modules/auth/auth.service.spec.ts using mocked PrismaService, OtpService, and SmsService. E2E tests in test/ directory with real database (test DB). Follow test patterns from test/auth-password-reset.e2e-spec.ts (Story 2.6). Test coverage for all acceptance criteria. Use describe/it blocks with clear test names.
tests.ideas: AC-2.7.1-2.7.2: Test verifyPhone() with valid phoneNumber and code AC-2.7.3: Test OTP validation with purpose='phone-verification' filter AC-2.7.4: Test User.phoneVerified updated to true after valid OTP AC-2.7.5: Test OTP deleted or marked verified=true after validation AC-2.7.6: Test successful response format AC-2.7.7: Test all OTP failure modes (expired, invalid code, max attempts exceeded) AC-2.7.8-2.7.9: Test resendVerificationOtp() generates new OTP and sends SMS AC-2.7.10: Test rate limiting on resend endpoint (4th request in 15 min → 429) AC-2.7.11: Test already verified user returns success without error E2E: Test full registration → OTP verification → login flow E2E: Test resend invalidates previous OTP E2E: Test user can login after phone verification (was blocked before)
